commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review is needed to enforce exact-head live iMessage proof and choose the canonical branch; automation cannot supply the contributor's real Messages environment proof.; Cleared: No security or supply-chain concern found; the diff only touches iMessage send logic and colocated tests, with no dependency, workflow, lockfile, permission, or secret-handling changes. (sha=aa256dfed252e0a011a9bf9c27438e2fbc838588)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes `extensions/imessage/src/send.ts` to route iMessage direct-handle media through `send-attachment`, split captions into follow-up text sends, and adds regression coverage in `extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts`.

PR surface: Source +41, Tests +102. Total +143 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main only tries `send-attachment` for media-only explicit chat targets, so direct handles and captioned media fall through to RPC `send` with `file`. I did not run a live Messages repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed to enforce exact-head live iMessage proof and choose the canonical branch; automation cannot supply the contributor's real Messages environment proof.

target.title: fix: route iMessage DM media through attachment handoff
target.body:
## Summary
- route direct-handle iMessage media sends through `send-attachment` instead of the legacy RPC `send` + `file` path
- send captioned media as an attachment handoff followed by a normal text message
- add regression coverage for direct-handle media-only, direct-handle captioned media, explicit-chat captioned media, and the no-caller-client caption follow-up cleanup path

## Test Plan
- [x] `pnpm vitest run extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts -t "routes DM handle media-only sends through send-attachment|sends DM handle media captions as attachment plus follow-up text|sends explicit chat media captions as attachment plus follow-up text|closes created caption follow-up clients when no caller client is supplied"`
- [x] `pnpm vitest run extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts`
- [x] `pnpm test:extension imessage` *(still fails on current `upstream/main` in `extensions/imessage/src/monitor.last-route.test.ts` and `extensions/imessage/src/targets.test.ts`; the same two failures reproduce after merging the latest `upstream/main` into this branch)*

## Notes
- AI-assisted: yes
- This PR is intentionally scoped to the iMessage media handoff fix only.
- Latest `upstream/main` has been merged into this branch to keep it current with `main`.
- The broader iMessage extension lane is not currently a clean merge signal for this branch because current `upstream/main` still fails in `extensions/imessage/src/monitor.last-route.test.ts` and `extensions/imessage/src/targets.test.ts`.
- Overlap: #87715 addresses the same user-facing direct-media issue and already includes a live proof run; this branch keeps the same send-path behavior but splits out the scoped cleanup/regression work maintainers asked for.
- Closes #87597

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior addressed: direct-handle iMessage media sends deliver the attachment via `send-attachment`, and captioned direct-handle media sends deliver the attachment first and the caption as a separate text send. This branch also preserves the follow-up cleanup path that closes a caption client created only for the recursive text send.
- Real environment tested: overlapping PR #87715 already captured a real local macOS Messages/iMessage bridge proof for the shared direct-media send path on a source checkout at `c67f998bc5`, with a configured outbound handoff directory and an existing 1:1 iMessage conversation. This current branch keeps that same `extensions/imessage/src/send.ts` direct-media handoff path and only adds the narrower no-caller-client cleanup/regression around the caption follow-up client.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: for the shared direct-media path, the real source-PR probe sent one media-only PNG and then captioned PNGs to a direct iMessage handle through the branch-local `sendMessageIMessage` path, recorded the invoked command names, queried bot-visible Messages history, and checked the handoff directory for uniquely named leftovers after send completion. On this current branch, I additionally re-verified the narrower follow-up-client path on PR head with `pnpm vitest run extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts` after merging the latest `upstream/main`.
- Evidence after fix: terminal capture / redacted live output from the overlapping source-PR probe for the shared direct-media path:

```json
{
  "calls": ["send-attachment"],
  "sentText": "OpenClaw PR #87715 cleanup live test",
  "leftovers": []
}
```

Redacted bot-visible history for that live probe also showed outgoing `image/png` attachment rows with `missing:false`; captioned cases were followed by outgoing text rows containing the caption.
- Observed result after fix: the shared direct-handle path delivered a PNG attachment for media-only sends, delivered a PNG attachment followed by caption text for captioned sends, and left no temporary handoff copies behind after completion. On this current branch, the additional targeted regression still confirms the no-caller-client caption follow-up path closes the created client while preserving the same `[media, text]` receipt sequence.
- What was not tested: this cron environment cannot run a fresh exact-head live Messages/chat.db proof because `imsg chats --json` currently fails with `authorization denied` on `~/Library/Messages/chat.db`, so the extra no-caller-client cleanup path on this branch was validated by targeted regression rather than a new exact-head live send.
target.author: hoyalim

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: HOYALIM
